name: Beauty Kadan Co., Ltd.
summary: Beauty Kadan Co., Ltd. operates in the funeral flower altar and flower wholesale businesses in Japan. It is involved in the planning, proposal, and logistics of fresh flowers, as well as bridal flower business. The company sells flowers primarily to retail florists and flower departments of funeral companies. Beauty Kadan Co., Ltd. was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Kumamoto, Japan.
